examples: Still a devout Muslim, Lindh reads the Quran and prays every day.
Those devout traders, called "Wali Ullah" or "those close to God", energetically spread both trade and religion by adapting their appeals tothe native mysticism of Java.
On the last Sunday of July (Reek Sunday), devout pilgrims follow his original route, traditionally without shoes.
He is about as socially conservative as one can be, and is a devout Catholic.
